creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-12-28 13:22:38 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-dynrules    Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  dynrules is a dynamic ruleset scripting package for Python. It uses the
  Dynamic Scripting technique to create adaptive AI scripts automatically
  from predefined rulesets.
  
  WWW: http://sysfault.org/projects
  
  PR:             ports/129848
  Submitted by:   Marcus von Appen <mva at sysfault.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3303    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/devel/py-dynrules/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-dynrules/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/py-dynrules/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +53 -0     ports/devel/py-dynrules/pkg-plist (new)
